rule: hit iff kw>=2 OR sem>=0.7 OR func>=0.7; total_hits>=1 -> FAIL

results.title: eLLM Elastic Memory Mgmt (2025/6)
results.snippet: LLM-side: virtual-tensor abstraction; runtime inflation/deflation; CPU memory as extensible buffer.

results.title: dLLM-Serve Memory Footprint Crisis (2025/12)
results.snippet: LLM-side: oscillating activation footprints; dynamic expand/contract.

results.title: Dynamic Memory Compression — Retrofitting LLMs (2024/3)
results.snippet: LLM-side: online KV cache compression at inference; per-head per-layer compression ratio.

results.title: MorphServe — Runtime Quantized Layer Swapping + KV Resize (2025/6)
results.snippet: LLM-side: replaces less-impactful layers with quantized versions during high-load; pressure-aware KV resize.

results.title: Layer-wise Dynamic Rank Compression (2025/9)
results.snippet: LLM-side: SVD-based per-layer dynamic rank compression.

results.title: Compression-Aware Memory Controller Design (2025/3)
results.snippet: LLM-side: hardware-aware compression for KV cache.

fail_reason: 5 of 8 results trigger a hit (ranks 2-6) via sem>=0.7 AND func>=0.7. eLLM (2506.15155, sem=0.84/func=0.85), dLLM-Serve (2512.17077, sem=0.79/func=0.80), DMC (2403.09636, sem=0.78/func=0.75), MorphServe (2506.02006, sem=0.86/func=0.88) and Layer-wise Dynamic Rank Compression (2509.25622, sem=0.75/func=0.74) cover elastic memory inflation/deflation, oscillating activation footprint, dynamic memory compression, runtime quantized layer swap and dynamic low-rank compression — the BAOBAB mechanism of peak-load low-rank collapse with off-peak restore is not novel.
